title: Components, Cycles, Topological Order, and Unweighted Paths · Structure Brief: Multi Source Bfs
summary: Validate a deployment dependency plan and explain unreachable service routes. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa multi source bfs increment in a dependency analyzer with path evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use multiple initial frontier nodes for nearest-source and propagation problems.
Reconstruct an actual path from predecessor evidence instead of reporting reachability alone.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
